pages.title: µü»: stand still
pages.text: $(l)µü»$() only works after you write it and stay still. Moving, taking damage, attacking, or right-clicking breaks it.$(br2)Duration ranges from 30 seconds to 3 minutes based on stave tier. It is for recovering in a safe corner after combat, not healing while swinging.

pages.title: ķÜÉ: vanish
pages.text: $(l)ķÜÉ$() helps you disengage or slip past ordinary enemies. Attacking, right-clicking, opening containers, mining, or placing blocks immediately breaks it.$(br2)Elite and boss-style enemies weaken stealth so it cannot skip every challenge.

pages.title: ÕØÜ / ń©│
pages.text: $(l)ÕØÜ$() is your bracing defense. Iron and above becomes steadier under repeated hits, making it harder for enemies to chain you down.$(br2)$(l)ń©│$() is stability against terrain, knockback, and explosions. Wood only softens knockback a little; iron cuts it hard; netherite almost holds you in place.

pages.title: Heavy knockback
pages.text: ń©│ also weakens explosion push. Diamond and netherite can cancel heavy knockback outright: diamond cancels 1 charge, netherite cancels 2.$(br2)In short: ÕØÜ helps you tank the line; ń©│ stops the arena, explosions, and repeated bumps from throwing you away.
